name: lemoncrow
description: AI task/procedure/runtime layer for agentic workflows

interface.shortDescription: LemonCrow tools and trace capture for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the LemonCrow MCP transport, role skills, standalone custom agents, and trace capture for Codex. LemonCrow code instructions apply to the main session through AGENTS.md; lemoncrow.code, lemoncrow.explore, lemoncrow.review, lemoncrow.plan, lemoncrow.execute, lemoncrow.research, and lemoncrow.solve are available as custom subagents.
defaultPrompt: Use AGENTS.md for code mode; the legacy lemoncrow_code config alias is not required.
Spawn lemoncrow.plan, lemoncrow.explore, or lemoncrow.review for focused analysis.
Spawn lemoncrow.execute, lemoncrow.solve, lemoncrow.research, or lemoncrow.code when appropriate.
